response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops
Experience with low-latency systems and performance-critical code in DLang and C++
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling as required
No evidence of deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture knowledge
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware performance experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU performance optimization background
BS degree with insufficient relevant experience
